creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


Searching the web for "graphviz-2.30.1.tar.gz" (with Quotes) 
gives plenty of distfile caches. 
It is safe to DL the distfiles from theren and 
have the port vaidates its inegrity by make. 

The FreeBSD ports cluster is back. 
The automatic fallback is working again. 

In case of longer outages, 
I will upload nmy local distfiles and or update the MATER_SITES.
